title: ageratina bishopii
intro: Ageratina bishopii, also known as Bishop's Wing or Hierba de San Nicolas, is a plant species in the mint family Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion. Ageratina bishopii is often prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal and health benefits.
